videoUploader.title: Upload Video
videoUploader.dropzone: Drag & drop video file here, or click to select
videoUploader.selectPlatformFirst: Select at least one platform to see requirements
videoUploader.unsupportedType: Unsupported file type. Please upload a video file.

platformLimit.title: Platform Requirements
platformLimit.selectPlatform: Select target platforms to see upload requirements

storageMode.title: Storage Mode
storageMode.cloudDescription: Video stored on server for multi-platform publishing. Subject to storage fees.
storageMode.localDescription: Upload directly to a single platform. No storage fees.
